segments.text: For the director of music. With stringed instruments.
May God be gracious to us and bless us and make his face shine on us—
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: so that your ways may be known on earth, your salvation among all nations.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May the peoples praise you, God; may all the peoples praise you.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May the nations be glad and sing for joy, for you rule the peoples with equity and guide the nations of the earth.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May the peoples praise you, God; may all the peoples praise you.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The land yields its harvest; God, our God, blesses us.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: God blesses us, and all the ends of the earth will fear him.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
